result.name: Witch bottle
result.description: Level: 1d6 + 1 Form: Ornate stoppered bottle filled with wine, seawater, or pins and needles Effect: Captures a witch (of a level up to the cypher’s level). Upon entering the bottle, the witch takes damage equal to the cypher’s level and is trapped until someone whispers their name into the bottle’s mouth and releases them.
